instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow gear shifting only when vehicle speed is above the minimum threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit gear shifting when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Min_Shift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Shift_Speed AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Speed_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting when vehicle speed exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shifting when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Max_Shift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Max_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Shift_Speed AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_OverSpeed_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow downshift only when vehicle speed falls below a threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit downshift when Vehicle_Speed is less than Downshift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Downshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Downshift_Speed THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Downshift_Speed AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed < Critical_Low_Speed THEN Activate_LowSpeed_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow upshift when vehicle speed exceeds calibrated threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger upshift when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Upshift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Upshift_Speed THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed AND Engine_Load < Load_Limit THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Disable_Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Activate_Speed_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when vehicle speed is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse engagement when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Reverse_Speed_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Reverse_Speed_Limit THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Reverse_Speed_Limit THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Reverse_Speed_Limit AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict shifting when vehicle speed is unstable.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift requests when vehicle speed fluctuation exceeds Speed_Variance.

L4_requirements: IF Speed_Variation > Speed_Variance THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Speed_Variation <= Speed_Variance THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Speed_Variation > Speed_Variance AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Speed_Variation > Critical_Variance THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable shifting during cruising speeds.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow gear shifts when Vehicle_Speed is within Cruise_Speed_Range.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed >= Cruise_Min AND Vehicle_Speed <= Cruise_Max THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed < Cruise_Min OR Vehicle_Speed > Cruise_Max THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed NOT_IN Cruise_Speed_Range AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_OverSpeed_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when vehicle speed signal is invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shifting when vehicle speed signal validity equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed_Signal_Valid = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed_Signal_Valid = FALSE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code
IF Vehicle_Speed_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict shifting during very low vehicle speeds.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent gear shift when Vehicle_Speed is below Idle_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Idle_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Idle_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed < Idle_Speed AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed < Critical_Low_Speed THEN Activate_Idle_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement when vehicle speed exceeds threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park engagement when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Park_Speed_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Park_Speed_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Park_Speed_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Park_Speed_Limit AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Warning
